LAW AND MOTION, 301, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO SET HEARING ON APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR SALE OF DWELLING, SUBMITTED ON OCT-07-2002 BY JAMES J. MCBRIDE. APPEARANCES MADE. THE COURT DETERMINED THAT 500793 AND 500794 WERE IDENTICAL AND ORDERED A HEARING FOR BOTH CASES. WITNESS MARIA MASIGAN EVANS WAS SWORN AND EXAMINED. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBIT A, AN APPRAISAL OF THE CONDOMINIUM AT 66 CLEARY CT., WAS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE. MATTER A R G U E D AND THE COURT TOOK THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. (JJM/301/CL) COURT REPORTER ERIC THRONE, CSR 7855

Off Calendar Oct-16-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Leslie Holmes, Esq., for Assignee of Record JOSE MEZZETTI dba MEZZETTI FINANCIAL SERVICES moving for an order to show cause to set hearing for an order for sale of dwelling
Arnold I. Weber, Esq., 398-4670, for defendant and opposing party
* The Court determined that 500793 and 500794 were identical and ordered a hearing for both cases. Witness Maria Masigan Evans was sworn and examined. Defendant's Exhibit A, an appraisal of the condominium at 66 Cleary Ct., was marked and admitted into evidence.
** Matter A R G U E D and the Court took this matter under submission. (JJM/301/CL) Court Reporter Eric Throne, CSR 7855

Order To Show Cause To Set Hearing On Application For Order For Sale Of Dwelling
Off Calendar May-29-2002 Continued To Jun-06-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Arnold I. Weber, Esq. 398-4670 for Plaintiff and moving party
Leslie Holmes, Esq. of the LAW OFFICES OF THOMAS R. HOGAN 408/292-7600 for MEZZETTI opposing party

Ms. Holmes is file a substitution of attorney by tomorrow. Argued and the Court continued this matter to June 6, 2002. Counsel to meet and confer re appointment of an appraiser. Parties may get a minute order from the Court directing them to conduct other business. Each side may file further pleadings not totalling more than 10 pages. The Court on its own motion consolidated this action with Action No. 500794. (JJM/cl) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
